news.t: Just One Dividend ETF Beat the S&P 500 in the Past Decade. It Comes with a Catch.
Nvidia Isn't Dead. But These Dividend ETFs Are Crushing It.
Think the S&P 500 is too expensive? Check out these ETFs instead.

holdings.infoBox: RDVY is an equity ETF with a total of 75 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lam Research stock at 5.26%, Applied Materials at 4.64%, KLA Corporation at 4.20%, GE Vernova at 2.66%, and Alphabet at 2.57%.

overview.description: The First Trust Rising Dividend Achievers ETF (RDVY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ US Rising Dividend Achievers index. The fund tracks an index of 50 large-cap stocks with rising, high-quality dividends. RDVY was launched on Jan 6, 2014 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: Just One Dividend ETF Beat the S&P 500 in the Past Decade. It Comes with a Catch.
data.text: First Trust Rising Dividend Achievers has returned an annual 15.8% over the past 10 years. But don't look too closely at its dividend.

data.title: Nvidia Isn't Dead. But These Dividend ETFs Are Crushing It.
data.text: Funds investing in high -yielding stocks like Exxon Mobil, Ford, Coca-Cola and Walmart are blowing it out of the water.

data.title: Think the S&P 500 is too expensive? Check out these ETFs instead.
data.text: Some investors are worried that the stock market is set up for a tech-driven decline.
